entries.name: akm-find
entries.description: Use when an agent needs a short ranked shortlist of akm assets for a task instead of raw search output.

entries.name: akm-review-stash
entries.description: Use when an agent must audit a stash's metadata, safety, and maintenance before installation.

entries.name: akm-review-proposal
entries.description: Use when an agent needs a structured accept-or-reject review of a proposal-queue entry.

entries.name: akm-harvest-session-knowledge
entries.description: Use when an agent should gather context and kick off the session-log knowledge-harvest workflow with explicit parameters.
